name: a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. Common Stock
summary: a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. is a global platform of direct-to-consumer fashion brands, including Princess Polly, Culture Kings, and Petal & Pup. The company acquires and operates online fashion brands, targeting millennial and Gen Z consumers. a.k.a. Brands is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
